system.description: Originally a school of ancient Iruvian sword arts, since expanded into criminal endeavors.
system.goal_2: Become ward boss of Crow’s Foot
system.turf: HQ in their sword-fighting school/temple. Operates a handful of high-end drug dens across Crow’s Foot and the Docks.
system.assets: Small contingent of master sword-fighters. Master alchemist; many potent potions and essences.
system.quirks: Several members of the Red Sashes are the sons and daughters of Iruvian nobility and diplomats in Doskvol. They train in swordplay at the school and sometimes participate in gang activities. Their families are powerful and will commit significant resources to punishing anyone who harms their children.
system.notables: Mylera Klev (leader, shrewd, ruthless, educated, art collector).
system.allies: Iruvian Consulate, The Path of Echoes, Dockers, Cabbies, Inspectors.
system.situation: The Red Sashes and the Lampblacks are at war over turf and vengeance for deaths on both sides. Mylera is recruiting every free blade in the district for extra muscle and doesn’t take no for an answer. You’re either with them or against them. The Red Sashes are very well-connected, with former sword students placed at the Iruvian Consulate, in the Path of Echoes, and among the Inspectors.
